kill_fact: The catalyst is genuinely LIVE and the Q4-2026 date in the file is CORRECT (a prior skeptic pass wrongly demoted it to Q1 2027 off the stale Nov-3-2025 release; the company's LATER guidance — Jan 12, 2026 IR update and the May 6, 2026 Q1 earnings — both explicitly state ECLIPSE 1 TOPLINE in Q4 2026, with ECLIPSE 2/3 in Q1 2027). The real weakness the file glosses: the pending ECLIPSE 1 readout is a PURE BINARY clinical event with NO contractual payout — no deal-break price, no CVR, no financing backstop. A Phase 3 miss drops the stock toward net cash (~$4.6-4.8/sh), so the claimed ~$5.5 floor is SOFT, not hard. Critically, the largest/most-certain catalyst (the Astellas validation) ALREADY FIRED and re-rated the stock ~133% YTD; the live price ($10.36, prev close $10.03) sits ABOVE the $11.5 base case, so the wide arbitrage spread the funnel was built to capture is substantially CLOSED. Asymmetry survives only as gated pipeline option value, not a live mispriced spread.
corrections: (1) Astellas deal CLOSED April 16, 2026 (post-HSR); the Feb 23, 2026 date is the ANNOUNCEMENT, not the close. (2) Cash floor is more modest than the headline implies: near-term Astellas cash = $335M ($240M upfront + $75M equity at $10.36/sh + $20M milestone), NOT ~$1.7B in hand. The ~$1.635B total is overwhelmingly far-future development/regulatory/sales milestones plus tiered ex-US royalties. (3) SOLSTICE 96-week result is 88% (21/24) undetectable HDV RNA vs 46% monotherapy — NOT the '100% below limit of quantification' the file claims. (4) ECLIPSE 1 topline Q4 2026 and ECLIPSE 2/3 Q1 2027 are BOTH CORRECT as logged (ignore any prior pass that flipped ECLIPSE 1 to Q1 2027).
evidence: Vir Biotechnology, 'Provides Updates on Chronic Hepatitis Delta and Oncology Programs and Upcoming 2026 Clinical Milestones,' Jan 12, 2026 (investors.vir.bio / Yahoo Finance / BioSpace): 'Topline data from the ECLIPSE 1 trial is expected in the fourth quarter of 2026'; ECLIPSE 2/3 topline expected Q1 2027; SOLSTICE 96-wk = 88% (21/24) undetectable HDV RNA vs 46% monotherapy; VIR-5818 HER2 Phase 1 data 2H 2026; ~$781M cash (12/31/2025), runway into Q4 2027.

Vir Biotechnology Q1 2026 Corporate Update, May 6, 2026 (investors.vir.bio; SEC EDGAR 8-K CIK 0001706431, a20260506-q1ex991earningsr): ECLIPSE 1 enrollment complete (~120 pts, 2:1), topline EXPECTED Q4 2026 (composite TND + ALT normalization at wk48); ECLIPSE 2/3 topline Q1 2027 — reaffirms the Q4-2026 ECLIPSE 1 topline date.

Vir Biotechnology, 'Announces Closing of Global Strategic Collaboration' (Astellas/VIR-5500), April 16, 2026 (stocktitan.net/news/VIR): deal closed after HSR expiration; $240M upfront + $75M equity at $10.36/share + $20M near-term milestone (=$335M near-term), up to ~$1.37B further milestones + tiered double-digit ex-US royalties; 50/50 US profit split. Announcement was Feb 23, 2026 (SEC 8-K a20260223-q4ex991astellasv).

FMP live quote, VIR, 2026-06-29: price $10.36, previous close $10.03, 52-wk range $4.16-$11.66, mkt cap ~$1.75B — confirms the Feb Astellas re-rate is already in the price and the live price sits at/above the $11.5 base case (spread to $20 target gated on the binary Q4-2026 readout).
